assistant: A transformer is a neural network architecture that uses self-attention to model relationships across tokens in a sequence.

user: Why do we mask future tokens?
assistant: We mask future tokens so the model learns causal next-token prediction instead of peeking ahead at the answer.
Supervised fine-tuning teaches the pretrained model to follow an instruction-response format by optimizing on curated user and assistant examples.

P vs. NP asks whether every problem whose solution can be checked quickly can also be solved quickly. If P = NP, many hard problems in math, cryptography, and optimization would become much easier to solve.
